string.text:
The MP9 is a compact and versatile selective-fire submachine gun renowned for its reliability and ergonomic design by Brugger and Thomet, as a development of the Steyr TMP. It has gained popularity as a reliable firearm in military and law enforcement circles. It is made of polymer and also corrosion-resistant, with a stock that folds to the right side of the weapon, and an integrated Picatinny rail. Its design and ease of operability allows the user to holster the weapon like a machine pistol or personal defense weapon for rapid deployment in self-defence.
 The MP9-N is a further refined variant, firing at an increased fire rate. It is effective as PDW or for concealed carry for security and bodyguards.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] All collimators for the Picatinny/weaver system.
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Rifle Dynamics ISG Sound Suppressor

The MP9 is a compact and versatile selective-fire submachine gun renowned for its reliability and ergonomic design by Brugger and Thomet, as a development of the Steyr TMP. It has gained popularity as a reliable firearm in military and law enforcement circles. It is made of polymer and also corrosion-resistant, with a stock that folds to the right side of the weapon, and an integrated Picatinny rail. Its design and ease of operability allows the user to holster the weapon like a machine pistol or personal defense weapon for rapid deployment in self-defence.
 The MP9-N is a further refined variant, firing at an increased fire rate. It is effective as PDW or for concealed carry for security and bodyguards.
 A laser pointer module has been attached to this particular gun.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] All collimators for the Picatinny/weaver system.
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Rifle Dynamics ISG Sound Suppressor
Standard magazine for the MP9 Submachinegun, it holds 30 rounds of 9x19mm ammunition.
Extended magazine for the MP9 Tactical Submachinegun, it holds 40 rounds of 9x19mm ammunition.
